title: bauhinia ellenbeckii
intro: Bauhinia ellenbeckii, also known as the African horsefly tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia ellenbeckii include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Bauhinia ellenbeckii is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and can also be used as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions.
